description: You are a Mechatronics Engineer at a custom fabrication shop. A Python script was written to post-process G-code files generated by your CAM software. It calculates total job time and formats the code for a legacy CNC controller. However, the machine is cutting incorrect dimensions, rejecting files with syntax errors, and the estimated times are wildly inaccurate. The source code is located at /home/ga/workspace/gcode_processor/. A test suite is provided. Locate and fix all 5 bugs across the parser, state machine, geometry, analyzer, and exporter modules so the full test suite passes and the script can process real toolpaths correctly.
